-  kDNSServiceErr_Timeout 

Global Variable# kDNSServiceErr_Timeout

iOS 10.0+iPadOS 10.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.12+tvOS 10.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 3.0+

```
var kDNSServiceErr_Timeout: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/dnssd/kDNSServiceErr_Timeout#Discussion)

A timeout occurred because the kDNSServiceFlagsTimeout + flag was passed.
